Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class IdentityTranslatorBase

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentityTranslatorBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
IdentityTranslator
public abstract class IdentityTranslatorBase extends Object
Contains the logic of the IdentityTranslator. For more details see the IdentityTranslator.t
